track.description: Record the actions a user perform

upsert.description: Create a new user, or update the current one if it already exists (upsert)

remove.description: Remove a user from a list

name.description: The name of the event to track

key.description: The end user specified key of the user defined data

value.description: The end user specified value of the user defined data

key.description: The end user specified key of the user defined data

value.description: The end user specified value of the user defined data

email.description: Either email or userId must be passed in to identify the user. If both are passed in, email takes precedence.

id.description: Optional event ID. If an event exists with that ID, the event will be updated. If none is specified, a new ID will automatically be generated and returned.

userId.description: userId that was passed into the updateUser call

mergeNestedObjects.description: Whether to merge top level objects instead of overwriting (default: false), e.g. if user profile has data: {mySettings:{mobile:true}} and change contact field has data: {mySettings:{email:true}}, the resulting profile: {mySettings:{mobile:true,email:true}}

channelUnsubscribe.description: Whether to unsubscribe email from list's associated channel - essentially a global unsubscribe

preferUserId.description: Whether to create a new user if the idetifier does not exist

userId.description: Unique identifier for a particular user

listId.description: Identifier to be used. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.
